MV ZARAAR HANIF 55,693 MT DWT OPEN HONG GAI, VIETNAM 30 DEC -5 JAN 2026
-/ Maisam
PLS PROPOSE SUITABLE ORDERS FOR BELOW TONNAGE
MV ZARAAR HANIF 55,693 MT DWT OPEN HONG GAI, VIETNAM 30 DEC -5 JAN 2026
CURRENT CARGO: SALT IN BULK
BOD ABT 750.00 MT VLSFO, LSMGO: ABT 68.00 MT.
CAN LOAD STEEL COIL 2X25 MT
DECK LOADING OK, BUT NO HATCH COVER LOADING
RIGHTSHIP RATING
MV. ZARAAR HANIF (EX NAME: NORD TRUST)
DWT: 55,693 MT ON 12.573 M DRAFT
TYPE OF VESSEL: SINGLE DECK GEARED BULK CARRIER
YEAR OF BUILT/SHIPYARD: 2009 / MITSUI TAMANO, JAPAN.
FLAG/ REGISTRY/ CLASS: BANGLADESH/CHATTOGRAM/BV
LOA / LBP: 189.990 / 182.0 M BEAM / DEPTH: 32.26 M / 17.90 M
GRT/NRT: 31,232 / 18,516
TPC: 55.8
HOLD CUBIC (PRELIMINARY) GRAIN/BALE: 70,855.30 M3 / 68,116.80 M3 HATCH COVER: ELECTRO-HYDRAULIC DRIVEN HATCH COVER, FOLDING TYPE FORE/AFT.
HATCH COVER LENGTH BREADTH: NO.1: 17.6 M X 18.92 M, NO.2-5: 21.12 M X 18.92 M HATCH COVER STRENGTH: NO.1: 4 MT/M2, NO.2, 4 & 5: 1.8 MT/M2, NO.3: 2.9 MT/M2, CARGO LOADING ON HATCH COVER IS NOT CONSIDERED.
CRANES: 4 X 30.5 TON SWL (HOOK OPERATION) OR 24 TON (GRAB OPERATION). RADIUS 26 M, OUTREACH FROM SHIPS RAIL 9.87 M UNDER NORMAL WORKING CONDITION.
GRABS: THE VESSEL FITTED WITH 6 UNITS OF 12.0 M3 GRABS (MAX PERMITTED DENSITY 2.3 TON/M3). FOR HEAVY CARGOES, MASTER SHALL HAVE THE RIGHT TO REMOVE SPILL PLATE OF GRAB TO REDUCE VOLUME.
MAXIMUM CAPACITY OF 4 GRABS 14 MT & REST 2 GRABS 15.6 MT . GEARS/GRABS NOT TO BE USED UNLESS EXPRESSIVELY SPECIFIED IN CP. FOR GRAIN, FERTILIZER, SUGAR AND SIMILAR TYPE CARGO MINOR LEAKAGE ACCEPTABLE).
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION AT SEA: BALLAST ABT 13.50 KTS AND LADEN ABT 12.00 KTS ON ABT 27.50 MT VLSFO 380 CST ABT & 0.1 MT LSMGO FOR ME & AE.
ECO SPEED & CONSUMPTION AT SEA: BALLAST ABT 12.50 KTS AND LADEN ABT 11.50 KTS ON ABT 22.50 MT VLSFO 380 CST & 0.1 MT LSMGO FOR ME & AE.
IN PORT WORKING: ABT 4.20 MT VLSFO 380 CST & ABT 0.2 MT LSMGO & IDLE ABT 2.80 MT VLSFO 380 CST & ABT 0.2 MT LSMGO.
CONSUMPION MAY INCREASE BY ABT 1.0 MT VLSFO/DAY DURING BALLASTING/DEBALLASTING/BALLAST EXCHANGE OPERATIONS AT PORT/SEA,OR IN COLD WEATHER FOR BOILER USE.
- SPEED / CONS ARE ABT IN GOOD WEATHER UP TO MAX BF 4 AND SMOOTH SEA CONDITIONS AND NO ADVERSE CURRENTS OR NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, ON SSW DRAFT, NOT IN CONGESTED AREAS OR PASSING THROUGH STRAITS OR AREAS WITH POOR VISIBILITY AND PROVIDED NO BOTTOM FOULING DUE TO IDLE PERIODS OF 20 DAYS OR MORE. AN ADMISSIBLE PERIOD OF GOOD WEATHER HAS TO BE A PERIOD OF 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON TO NOON. EXTRAPOLATION OF “GOOD WEATHER” PERFORMANCE FOR “BAD WEATHER” PERIODS IS NOT ALLOWED. ADVERSE CURRENT HAS TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT WHEN ASSESSING VESSEL\'S SPEED AND CONSUMPTION. HOWEVER, FAVORABLE CURRENTS ARE TO BE EXPRESSLY EXCLUDED FROM VESSEL\'S PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS. TOTAL TIME LOST AND OVERCONSUMED BUNKERS CALCULATIONS SHALL BE BASED ON THE GOOD WEATHER PERIODS ONLY, MEANING THAT THE AVERAGE GOOD WEATHER PERFORMANCE CANNOT THEN BE EXTENDED AND APPLIED OVER THE WHOLE CHARTER DURATION INCLUDING BAD WEATHER. BAD WEATHER PERIODS TO BE DISREGARDED WHEN CALCULATING THE TIME LOST AND THE BUNKERS OVER CONSUMED THROUGH THE CHARTER PERIOD THAN THE WARRANTED TIME & CONSUMPTION, DURING GOOD/BAD WEATHER PERIOD IF VSL UNDERCONSUME THAN THE WARRANTED MAXIMUM CONSUMPTION AND OVERPERFORMED THAN THE MINIMUM WARRANTED SPEED IN THAT CASE OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO CREDIT FOR TIME & BUNKER SAVED. IN CASES WHEN VOYAGES ARE FROM SEA BUOY TO SEA BUOY ON VOYAGES LESS THAN 48 HOURS AND 24 HOURS AFTER COSP/PRIOR EOSP OR COASTAL TRADE, ACTUAL CONSUMPTION FIGURES TO APPLY.
VESSEL HAS THE LIBERTY TO USE LSMGO FOR THE MAIN ENGINE WHEN SECA, ECA, MANOEUVERING IN/OUT OF PORTS, CANALS, RIVERS, RESTRICTED AREAS, SHALLOW & NARROW WATERS, FOR STARTING UP/TURNING ENGINES, BURNING SLUDGE AND IN ADVERSE WEATHER, BAD/COLD WEATHER, HOLD CLEANING AND BILGE PUMPING. MASTER HAS THE AUTHORITY TO DIVERT COURSE FOR SMOOTH RUNNING/SAFETY OF THE VESSEL. SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES IN FAIR WEATHER WITHOUT ADVERSE CURRENT, POOR VISIBILITY, CONGESTION, NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL UP TO BEAUFORT SCALE FORCE 4 / DOUGLAS SEA STATE 3 / WAVE AND SWELL COMBINED HEIGHTS UPTO 1.25 M. ABOUT ON SPEED AND CONSUMPTION CLARIFIED AS MEANING 5% ALLOWANCE ON CONSUMPTION AND 0.5 KNOTS ON SPEED, BOTH IN OWNERS FAVOR. IT IS UNDERSTOOD THAT VESSEL NOT TO BE ORDERED TO SAIL ON ECONOMICAL SPEED/CONSUMPTION IN PIRACY RISKS AREAS
ALL DETAILS ABOUT AND GIVEN IN GOOD FAITH ANY SAVING IN CONSUMPTION MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY SPEED UNDERPERFORMANCE, ANY SAVING IN TIME MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST ANY EXCESS CONSUMPTION, ANY SAVING IN FO MUST BE OFF-SET AGAINST INCREASED MDO AND VICE VERSA, AND ANY OVERALL SAVING ON INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S) MUST BE SET OFF AGAINST AN OVERALL LOSS ON OTHER INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S). OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO A CREDIT FOR ANY BUNKER SAVINGS, WHICH ARE TO BE CALCULATED AS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN MAXIMUM QUANTITIES OF BUNKERS ALLOWED TO CONSUME AS PER ABOVE AND THE QUANTITY OF BUNKERS ACTUALLY CONSUMED DURING THE VOYAGE. THE PRICE OF THE BUNKER TO BE AS PER CP PRICE AGREED DURING NEGO. OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO THE SAID CREDIT FOR BUNKER SAVINGS IRRESPECTIVE OF WHETHER THERE IS ANY SPEED CLAIM. IN THE EVENT THAT THERE IS A SPEED CLAIM, THE CREDIT FOR BUNKER SAVINGS SHALL BE SET-OFF AGAINST ANY LOSS OF TIME TO REDUCE OR EXTINGUISH SPEED CLAIM, AND IN THE EVENT BUNKERS SAVINGS ARE OF VALUE GREATER THAN SPEED CLAIM, OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO CREDIT FOR REMAINING BALANCE OF BUNKER SAVINGS AFTER SETTING OFF SPEED CLAIM.OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO A CREDIT FOR ANY TIME SAVED, WHICH IS TO BE CALCULATED AS THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN MAXIMUM TIME THE SHIP WAS ALLOWED TO COMPLETE THE VOYAGE AS PER ABOVE AND THE TIME ACTUALLY TAKEN TO COMPLETE THE VOYAGE.OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO THE SAID CREDIT FOR TIME SAVED IRRESPECTIVE OF WHETHER THERE IS ANY OVER-CONSUMPTION CLAIM. IN THE EVENT THAT THERE IS AN OVER-CONSUMPTION CLAIM, THE CREDIT FOR TIME SAVED SHALL BE SET-OFF AGAINST ANY OVER-CONSUMPTION TO REDUCE OR EXTINGUISH OVER-CONSUMPTION CLAIM, AND IN THE EVENT TIME SAVED IS OF VALUE GREATER THAN OVER-CONSUMPTION CLAIM, OWNERS ARE ENTITLED TO CREDIT FOR REMAINING BALANCE OF TIME SAVED AFTER SETTING OFF OVER- CONSUMPTION CLAIM.
ADA
Best Regards
Maisam Raza
